_doc: See docs/20-architecture-refactor.md §4.5. Phase C.7 populated real numbers and flipped enforcement mode. Update this file after every phase that moves directories or adds/removes tests so the gate stays in sync.

proxy._comment_perDirectoryCoveragePct: Captured 2026-04-23 after lifting global floor to 98%. Phase E relocates routes/ → strategies/ and protocols/ → protocols/* so these keys will migrate; the gate skips directory-regression when a directory is absent from the live report (§4.5), which lets phases move code without re-editing this file. Update when a directory is intentionally removed.

enforcement._comment_perDirectoryFloors: Floors are set at or just below the captured baseline so normal per-commit noise doesn't trip the gate; real regressions are caught by the regression-from-baseline check which uses the stricter 0.1pp allowance.
enforcement._comment_allowUntestedFiles: Legacy src/ files intentionally uncovered by L1 tests. Shrink this list over time; the gate blocks any *new* addition.
